source.title: Creating a Fleet in Sage: Step-by-Step Guide
source.author: ATMTA / Star Atlas official publisher

summary.archival_abstract: Official support article titled “Creating a Fleet in Sage: Step-by-Step Guide.” This record preserves what Star Atlas Support / ATMTA publicly stated at the recorded publication time; claims about delivery, economics, or outcomes remain limited to the wording of the source.
summary.historical_value: Official evidence baseline for later reconciliation with community reporting.
summary.current_validity_warning: Official publication does not independently prove successful execution, completeness, or continued current validity.

article_text:
With your ships imported into Starbased, the next pivotal step is to form a fleet, enabling you to embark on various missions like mining and scanning for Survey Data Units (SDUs). Here’s how you can create your fleet within the Star Atlas universe:
Return to Your Faction's Central Space Station: Begin by navigating back to the central space station of your faction. This is where all your imported ships are housed and managed.
Access the Hangar: In the new menu that appears, locate and click on "Hangar."
Initiate Fleet Formation: Within the hangar view, you will see an option to "form a new Fleet." Clicking on this option takes you to the fleet creation interface.
Creating Your Fleet: You are now in the fleet creation view, which displays all available ships at the central space station. Here, you can:
Name Your Fleet: Choose a unique and identifiable name for your fleet.
Select Ships for Your Fleet: Browse through the list of available ships and select those you wish to include in your fleet. You can also specify the quantity for each selected ship.
Finalize Your Fleet: After selecting your ships and naming your fleet, click on "form a new fleet." This action will prompt your wallet for a transaction to officially create your fleet.
Confirm the Transaction: Approve the transaction through your wallet. Once confirmed, your fleet is successfully created and ready for action.
